GO Battle League.title: Ultra League and Fantasy Cup: Ultra League Edition | Forever Forward
GO Battle League.description:
The Ultra League and Fantasy Cup: Ultra League Edition will run from July 7, 2026, at 1:00 p.m. to July 14, 2026, at 1:00 p.m. PT.
- Pokémon must be at or below 2,500 CP to enter.
- Pokémon must be at or below 2,500 CP to enter.
- Only Dragon-, Steel-, and Fairy-type Pokémon are eligible.

GO Battle League.title: Master League and Retro Cup: Great League Edition | Forever Forward
GO Battle League.description:
The Master League and Retro Cup: Great League Edition will run from July 14, 2026, at 1:00 p.m. to July 21, 2026, at 1:00 p.m. PT.
Trainers will also receive 4× Stardust from win rewards (this does not include end-of-set rewards).
- All Pokémon are eligible.
- Pokémon must be at or below 1,500 CP to enter.
- Dark-, Steel-, and Fairy-type Pokémon are not eligible.

GO Battle League.title: Great League, Ultra League, and Master League | Forever Forward
GO Battle League.description:
The Great League, Ultra League, and Master League will run from July 21, 2026, at 1:00 p.m. to July 28, 2026, at 1:00 p.m. PT.
Trainers will also receive 4× Stardust from win rewards (this does not include end-of-set rewards).
- Pokémon must be at or below 1,500 CP to enter.
- Pokémon must be at or below 2,500 CP to enter.
- All Pokémon are eligible.

GO Battle League.title: Great League and Master Premier | Forever Forward
GO Battle League.description:
The Great League and Master Premier will run from July 28, 2026, at 1:00 p.m. to August 4, 2026, at 1:00 p.m. PT.
Trainers will also receive 4× Stardust from win rewards (this does not include end-of-set rewards).
- Pokémon must be at or below 1,500 CP to enter.
- No CP limit.
- Mythical and Legendary Pokémon are not eligible.

GO Battle League.title: Ultra League and Weather Cup: Great League Edition | Forever Forward
GO Battle League.description:
The Ultra League and Weather Cup: Great League Edition will run from August 4, 2026, at 1:00 p.m. to August 11, 2026, at 1:00 p.m. PT.
- Pokémon must be at or below 2,500 CP to enter.
- Pokémon must be at or below 1,500 CP to enter.
- Only Fire-, Water-, Ice-, and Rock-type Pokémon are eligible.

GO Battle League.title: Master League and Evolution Cup: Great League Edition | Forever Forward
GO Battle League.description:
The Master League and Evolution Cup: Great League Edition will run from August 11, 2026, at 1:00 p.m. to August 18, 2026, at 1:00 p.m. PT.
Trainers will also receive 4× Stardust from win rewards (this does not include end-of-set rewards).
- All Pokémon are eligible.
- Pokémon must be at or below 1,500 CP to enter.
- Only Pokémon that have evolved at least once and can evolve again will be eligible.

GO Battle League.title: Great League and Scroll Cup: Great League Edition | Forever Forward
GO Battle League.description:
The Great League and Scroll Cup: Great League Edition will run from August 18, 2026, at 1:00 p.m. to August 25, 2026, at 1:00 p.m. PT.
- Pokémon must be at or below 1,500 CP to enter.
- Pokémon must be at or below 1,500 CP to enter.
- Only Water-, Fighting-, and Dark-type Pokémon are eligible.
The following Pokémon will not be allowed.
- Primarina

GO Battle League.title: Great League, Ultra League, and Master League | Forever Forward
GO Battle League.description:
The Great League, Ultra League, and Master League will run from August 25, 2026, at 1:00 p.m. to September 1, 2026, at 1:00 p.m. PT.
Trainers will also receive 4× Stardust from win rewards (this does not include end-of-set rewards).
- Pokémon must be at or below 1,500 CP to enter.
- Pokémon must be at or below 2,500 CP to enter.
- All Pokémon are eligible.

GO Battle League.title: Great League, Ultra League, and Master League: Mega Edition | Forever Forward
GO Battle League.description:
The Great League, Ultra League, and Master League: Mega Edition will run from September 1, 2026, at 1:00 p.m. to September 8, 2026, at 1:00 p.m. PT.
Trainers will also receive 4× Stardust from win rewards (this does not include end-of-set rewards).
- Pokémon must be at or below 1,500 CP to enter.
- Pokémon must be at or below 2,500 CP to enter.
- No CP limit.
- Mega-Evolved Pokémon are allowed.

Raid Battles.description: Mega Lucario returns to Mega Raids from July 13, 2026 at 6 am to July 14, 2026 at 10 pm local time.

Pokémon Spotlight Hour will feature a different Pokémon and special bonus for one hour at 6:00 p.m. local time on Thursday.
July 16: The featured Pokémon is Zubat and the special bonus is 2× Catch XP.

Max Mondays.title: Dynamax Trubbish during Max Monday
Max Mondays.description:
These Dynamax Pokemon may appear in Max Battles throughout this season. Max Battles will be available from 6:00 a.m. to 9:00 p.m. local time on Mondays.
- Power Spots will refresh more frequently.
- Additional Power Spots will be active on Mondays compared to the rest of the week.
- Max Battles will rotate to feature different Dynamax Pokemon.
On July 20, 2026, the featured Dynamax Pokemon is Trubbish.
- Trubbish

Max Battles.description: The Gigantamax Rillaboom Max Battle Day event will take place on August 1, 2026 from 2 pm to 5 pm local time.

Choose Your Path.title: Choose Your Path: Fairy Trail
Choose Your Path.description:
Choose Your Path Timed Research is a new way to play during non-event weeks, giving you the freedom to explore Pokémon GO your way!
During a Choose Your Path Timed Research week, you’ll be able to select one of three paths: Explore, Catch, or Battle. Your choice will shape the Timed Research tasks and bonuses throughout the week.
You may have different research opportunities than other Trainers.

Choose Your Path.title: Choose Your Path: Venom and Vines
Choose Your Path.description:
Choose Your Path Timed Research is a new way to play during non-event weeks, giving you the freedom to explore Pokémon GO your way!
During a Choose Your Path Timed Research week, you’ll be able to select one of three paths: Explore, Catch, or Battle. Your choice will shape the Timed Research tasks and bonuses throughout the week.
You may have different research opportunities than other Trainers.

GO Pass.description:
The Pokémon GO 10th Anniversary Celebration continues with GO Pass: July! Ho-Oh, Gimmighoul holding a 10th anniversary coin, and more await.
From Tuesday, July 7, at 10:00 a.m. to Tuesday, August 4, at 10:00 a.m. local time, the GO Pass and GO Pass Deluxe for July will be available in Pokémon GO!

Season.title: Forever Forward

bonuses: 2× Daily Adventure Incense duration
Increased XP and Stardust from hatching Eggs
Increased limits on opening, receiving from PokéStop and Gym Photo Discs, and storing Gifts
One additional Candy for trading Pokémon

Season.description:
Welcome to Pokémon GO: Forever Forward!
In Pokémon GO, Seasons are periods of time that feature new events, Pokémon debuts, and surprises that all follow a certain theme. As the Seasons change, you may find different Pokémon appearing in your area and hatching from Eggs. Make sure to explore during each in-game Season to collect and train as many different Pokémon as you can! You’ll also enjoy special bonuses as you do.
